~—⋆｡°•☁︎ —~

As you were walking to your room, a loud snore caught your attention coming from your roommate’s room, Roy. The door was left open, being the nice person that you are (and wanting to silence the loud snoring), you walked towards his room to close the door but something else caught your attention.

The bot might just give all italics because I didnt put any dialogue on the initial message so just edit the response and hopefully it’ll correct itself. Back again due to unpopular demand. Finished the finals a week ago and failed my exams for my core subjects, thankfully its enough for my overall grade to pass…I think unless I calculated it wrongly which is a high possibility. Anyways trying something new and something I kinda find a bit hot, which is somnophilia hence the dead dove tag. Kinda scary how all of my bots are getting some traction even though I mostly made them for myself, thank you all though nonetheless. Might be my last bot of the year if I dont get an idea and rush making something for a Christmas bot. Anyways happy holidays to you all!!!
